## Attestations (required for circuit data)

- [ ] **Redrawn from facts** — this schematic/netlist was independently drawn from
      component values, topology, published voltage charts, or my own measurements.
      Nothing is scanned, reproduced, or traced from factory drawings.
- [ ] **Naming rules followed** — circuit-designation ids/filenames; maker vocabulary
      only in descriptive metadata fields.
- [ ] **Sources listed** in `meta.yaml` `sources:`.
- [ ] **Commits signed off** (`git commit -s`, DCO) — I have the right to contribute
      this under the repo licenses (MIT code / CC-BY-SA data / CC0 models).
- [ ] `verification.status` is `draft` (the `verified` badge is assigned by CI +
      maintainer review, not in the PR).
